name: Yangzhou Seashine New Materials Co.,Ltd.
summary: Yangzhou Seashine New Materials Co.,Ltd. engages in the design, production, and marketing of various powder metallurgy structural parts in China. The company offers external gears, bevel gears, gear rings, double teeths, sprockets, rotors, eccentric cams, swing arms, etc. Its products are applied in electric tools, automobiles, household appliances, office applications, etc. The company also exports its products to the United States, Germany, the Czech Republic, Hungary, Russia, Brazil and Mexico, India, Japan, the Philippines, Malaysia, and Hong Kong. Yangzhou Seashine New Materials Co.,Ltd. is based in Yangzhou, China.
